title: 'They’ll get mowed down': Did Trump reject Netanyahu’s plan to urge Iranians to protest?
summary_full: US president Trump reportedly rejected Israeli prime minister Netanyahu's proposal for a joint public call for Iranians to protest, fearing high civilian casualties. While Israel prioritizes fostering an uprising, the US views regime change as a secondary outcome. This divergence emerged after Israeli strikes targeting key Iranian security figures, aimed at creating conditions for popular dissent.
